text.title: multi-agent-design-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for multi-agent-design-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Infinite loop: supervisor routes to agent A, which routes back to supervisor, which routes to A again.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without a max_steps guard the loop never terminates. Set MAX_ITER and return a sentinel message to the user when reached.

failure-mode.description: Token explosion: each agent forwards its full conversation history to the next agent.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: History accumulates multiplicatively across multi-agent calls. Summarize or trim conversation history between agent steps.

failure-mode.description: Parallel fan-out agents writing to shared state simultaneously.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Race conditions corrupt state. Use merge nodes with explicit conflict resolution.
